subcodes.first_line: The iron hath been softened and the rock hath melted from the yearning of hearts, yet the wrongdoers persist in wondrous delusion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد لان الحدید و ذابت الصخره من حنین القلوب ولکن الظالمین فی غرور عجاب یدعون
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
